info.name: cs-agent-bot
info.description: Complete API surface for cs-agent-bot. Host defaults to https://localhost:8003 via the `base_url` variable. All dashboard endpoints require `X-Workspace-ID` and Bearer JWT. Generated from route.go on 2026-04-23.

variable.description: GCP Cloud Scheduler OIDC token (cron routes only).
HMAC signature header for handoff/payment webhooks.

item.name: Webhooks & Cron
item.description: OIDC for cron, HMAC for handoff/payment, HaloAI sig for /webhook/wa.

item.name: User Preferences (A1)
item.description: Per-user, per-workspace UI state store. FE-owned value shape.

item.name: Workspace Integrations (A2)
item.description: Per-workspace third-party credentials. Secrets redacted on read.

item.name: Approvals (A3)
item.description: Central dispatcher. Routes by request_type: create_invoice, mark_invoice_paid, collection_schema_change, delete_client_record, toggle_automation_rule. bulk_import uses its own endpoint.

item.name: Manual Actions (B)
item.description: GUARD manual-flow queue — 20 flows requiring human composition.

item.name: Fireflies
item.description: Transcript ingestion (feat/00-shared/07). Webhook is HMAC-signed and stateless — idempotent by fireflies_id.

body.raw:
{
  "code": "price_change",
  "name": "Price change re-engage",
  "description": "Fire when workspace pricing changes",
  "condition": "-",
  "template_code": "REACTIVATE_PRICE",
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "bants_clarity_score": 4,
  "discovery_depth_score": 5,
  "tone_fit_score": 3,
  "next_step_clarity_score": 4,
  "strengths": "Strong discovery questions",
  "improvements": "Close with a concrete next step",
  "action_items": "Send proposal by Fri"
}

{
  "master_data_id": "md-123",
  "source_channel": "call_note",
  "source_message": "Nanti saja pak, fokus Q4",
  "rejection_category": "timing",
  "severity": "mid",
  "analysis_summary": "Delay until Q4; keep warm",
  "suggested_response": "Set a Q3 check-in reminder",
  "analyst": "human",
  "analyst_version": "ae-v1"
}

item.name: Mock External APIs
item.description: FE QA surface for Claude / Fireflies / HaloAI / SMTP. Auto-active when MOCK_EXTERNAL_APIS=true or API keys absent. Every POST records to the shared in-memory outbox — inspect via GET /mock/outbox.

item.name: Wave C — Invoice Extras & Action Log
item.description: Endpoints added after FE-spec gap audit (2026-04-24): invoice activity/stage/partial + action-log aggregation.
